_metadata.name: Bug Bounty Evidence Router
_metadata.description: Public-data triage workflow that turns mixed bug bounty notes into routed CVE, npm package, and web evidence with recommended follow-up workflows.
_metadata.author: sentris-team

manifest.name: Bug Bounty Evidence Router
manifest.description: Normalize mixed researcher notes into public CVE, npm package, and web enrichment results with actionable follow-up workflow recommendations.
manifest.author: sentris-team

graph.name: Bug Bounty Evidence Router
graph.description: Routes messy bug bounty evidence notes into public CVE, npm dependency, and web enrichment.

runtimeInputs.label: Evidence notes
runtimeInputs.description: Pasted bug bounty notes, recon output, CVE IDs, npm package specs, URLs, or observations to route.

runtimeInputs.label: Authorized targets
runtimeInputs.description: Known in-scope hosts or URLs that may be safely probed.

runtimeInputs.label: Authorization notes
runtimeInputs.description: Scope, rate-limit, or authorization context copied into the final report.
